title: aegilops caudata subsp. cylindrica
intro: Aegilops caudata subsp. cylindrica, also known as Egyptian goat grass or jointed goat grass, is a type of wild grass belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant. It can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and folk treatments.
